title: Uruguayan-Style Brussels Sprouts Wrap
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with sautéed Brussels sprouts, crispy bacon, and a tangy Uruguayan-inspired sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Cook the bacon until crispy, then set aside on a paper towel-lined plate.
3. Add the Brussels sprouts to the skillet and cook until tender and caramelized, about 5-7 minutes.
4. Add the olive oil, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
5. Warm the wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the wrap by spreading the Uruguayan cheese on the wrap, followed by the Brussels sprouts mixture, and finishing with crispy bacon.
